ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of the institution (e.g., hospital, clinic, home health service) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the update occurred */,
  "update_day" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., student, user, department, job title, custom value) */,
  "students_added" INTEGER /* Number of students added */,
  "students_updated" INTEGER /* Number of students updated */,
  "users_removed" INTEGER /* Number of users removed */,
  "departments_added" INTEGER /* Number of departments added */,
  "job_titles_added" INTEGER /* Number of job titles added */,
  "custom_vals_added" TEXT /* Custom values added (e.g., 0/0/0/0) */,
  "updated_values" TEXT /* Updated values for students, users, departments, job titles, and custom values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the student is associated with */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the user is associated with */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the department is associated with */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Head or supervisor of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the job title is associated with */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_values" (
  "custom_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom value */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the custom value is associated with */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the custom value (e.g., text, date, number) */,
  "value_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom value */,
  "value_description" TEXT /* Description of the custom value */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the custom value (e.g., text, date, number) */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules for the custom value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_values_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the update event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, update, remove) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action in JSON format */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES updates ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
